mapper.insert: insert into design_quality ( design_quality_id, part_template_id, design_version, drawing_version, design_requirements, functional_requirements, tolerance_requirements, key_quality_characteristics, design_review_result, verification_result, create_time ) values ( #{designQualityId}, #{partTemplateId}, #{designVersion}, #{drawingVersion}, #{designRequirements}, #{functionalRequirements}, #{toleranceRequirements}, #{keyQualityCharacteristics}, #{designReviewResult}, #{verificationResult}, now() ) on duplicate key update part_template_id = values(part_template_id), design_version = values(design_version), drawing_version = values(drawing_version), design_requirements = values(design_requirements), functional_requirements = values(functional_requirements), tolerance_requirements = values(tolerance_requirements), key_quality_characteristics = values(key_quality_characteristics), design_review_result = values(design_review_result), verification_result = values(verification_result)

insert into manufacturing_quality ( manufacturing_quality_id, part_instance_id, production_order_id, workshop_id, production_line_id, start_time, end_time, process_status, final_inspection_result, defect_count, rework_count, create_time ) values ( #{manufacturingQualityId}, #{partInstanceId}, #{productionOrderId}, #{workshopId}, #{productionLineId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{processStatus}, #{finalInspectionResult}, #{defectCount}, #{reworkCount}, now() ) on duplicate key update part_instance_id = values(part_instance_id), production_order_id = values(production_order_id), workshop_id = values(workshop_id), production_line_id = values(production_line_id), start_time = values(start_time), end_time = values(end_time), process_status = values(process_status), final_inspection_result = values(final_inspection_result), defect_count = values(defect_count), rework_count = values(rework_count)

insert into service_quality ( service_quality_id, part_instance_id, equipment_id, component_id, installed_aircraft_id, installation_position, installation_date, service_status, total_running_hours, cycle_count, health_score, last_inspection_date, next_inspection_date, update_time ) values ( #{serviceQualityId}, #{partInstanceId}, #{equipmentId}, #{componentId}, #{installedAircraftId}, #{installationPosition}, #{installationDate}, #{serviceStatus}, #{totalRunningHours}, #{cycleCount}, #{healthScore}, #{lastInspectionDate}, #{nextInspectionDate}, now() ) on duplicate key update part_instance_id = values(part_instance_id), equipment_id = values(equipment_id), component_id = values(component_id), installed_aircraft_id = values(installed_aircraft_id), installation_position = values(installation_position), installation_date = values(installation_date), service_status = values(service_status), total_running_hours = values(total_running_hours), cycle_count = values(cycle_count), health_score = values(health_score), last_inspection_date = values(last_inspection_date), next_inspection_date = values(next_inspection_date), update_time = now()
